name: tap
description: Leo's private marketplace: taprun (engineering methodology skills) + typed-loop (well-typed agentic loop), derived from first principles.

plugins.name: typed-loop
plugins.description: A well-typed agentic loop — the typed successor to ralph-loop. The stop condition is an external verify command's exit code, not the agent's self-judged promise. Ships a deterministic ratchet (git checkpoint + revert-on-regression), a decreasing failure measure, red-team-until-dry, and an honest human gate for unformalizable acceptance. Moves the oracle out of the agent's token stream.

plugins.name: taprun
plugins.description: Engineering methodology skills derived from first principles: verify (deterministic verification gates), constraint-driven-development (RED→GREEN→Why), engineering-philosophy (12-fact framework for architecture and product tradeoffs), writing-plans (intent-verification decomposition), writing-adrs (ADR discipline — 6 principles + pre-commit checklist, language-agnostic), run-task (semi-autonomous task execution), demand-archaeologist (evidence-based demand discovery).
